insight: beads embedded Dolt does not support bd sql or bd dolt start in embedded mode. To query the Dolt SQL database from Node.js, use the standalone dolt CLI (dolt sql-server) pointed at .beads/embeddeddolt/<dbname>/ directory. The Dolt database path is .beads/embeddeddolt/<dbname>/.dolt/

shadcn/ui Base UI refers to shadcn's own Base UI integration (see https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/changelog/2026-01-base-ui), NOT MUI's Base UI library. They are the same component system, not two overlapping libraries.

ca watch resolves .compound-agent/agent_logs/.latest symlink relative to .beads/embeddeddolt/<dbname>/ instead of the project root. Use tail -f .compound-agent/agent_logs/loop_<epic>-<ts>.log directly for monitoring.
